subject: Update charts with policy latest released images
commit_message:
Update charts with policy latest released images

Issue-ID: POLICY-2045
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: Idb074c7d4239be1c225f9e89f6672288fd658227

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2862/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2862

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Brian - we haven't been able to finish releasing other artifacts (legacy engine and distribution). But at least for Integration testing, these images are what you would need.

Patch Set 1:

are you still waiting for Music's jar ?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> are you still waiting for Music's jar ?

Well we are waiting for Portal, who is waiting for Music. I have not seen movement on this - not sure what the hold up is. Very slow yesterday to release our apex-pdp.

Patch Set 1:

Morgan - do we have an ETA on the JobBuilder back in service - I'd like to wait for the CI results but wasnt sure if the power issue had "other" affects on the equiment

Patch Set 1:

No dependencies with music or any other components to be released for this review ..

We also need for integration testing this one to be merged at your earliest convenience:   

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/oom/+/94930/.   

No dependencies with others with this other one neither.

For the integration testing, core use cases: vFW, vDNS, .. 

we need this two above mentioned made available in labs.

Patch Set 1:

Jorge - did this install cleanly in your environment - can you post your healthcheck ?

Patch Set 1:

It runs OK from my side Brian, I have to say though I needed to reinstall a second time as I run into a glitch at first with one of the components restarting, for which I couldn't pinpoint the root cause. I will keep an eye to see if it reoccurs, but I believe this can be merged as is.  Also the equivalent snapshots from which the release images were built, I have them running OK in another lab.  Here is the output with this patch:
